mapper.insert: INSERT INTO note (id, title, content, tags, folder, subfolder, priority, is_favorite, is_encrypted, is_archived, is_deleted, deleted_at, reminder, template_id, owner_id, shared_with, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{tags, typeHandler=xyz.crearts.note.keeper.mapper.typehandler.StringListTypeHandler}, #{folder}, #{subfolder}, #{priority}, #{favorite}, #{encrypted}, #{archived}, #{deleted}, #{deletedAt, typeHandler=xyz.crearts.note.keeper.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler}, #{reminder, typeHandler=xyz.crearts.note.keeper.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler}, #{templateId}, #{ownerId}, #{sharedWith}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE note SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, tags = #{tags, typeHandler=xyz.crearts.note.keeper.mapper.typehandler.StringListTypeHandler}, folder = #{folder}, subfolder = #{subfolder}, priority = #{priority}, is_favorite = #{favorite}, is_encrypted = #{encrypted}, reminder = #{reminder, typeHandler=xyz.crearts.note.keeper.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler}, template_id = #{templateId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE note SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt, typeHandler=xyz.crearts.note.keeper.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{deletedAt, typeHandler=xyz.crearts.note.keeper.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE note SET is_archived = 1, updated_at = datetime('now','localtime') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM note WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at <= #{end}

SELECT * FROM note WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (title LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR content LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%') AND tags LIKE '%' || #{tags} || '%' AND priority = #{priority} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM note WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND is_archived = 0 AND shared_with LIKE '%' || #{userId} || '%' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE note SET shared_with = #{sharedWith}, updated_at = datetime('now','localtime') WHERE id = #{id}
